terms.gloss: Base conversion ~ 74% for a low, central, open-play kick
Aiming the natural (open-body) side vs dead centre
Aiming across the body vs dead centre
Aiming high (above the keeper's waist) vs low
Taking it in a shootout vs in open play

logit.note: Odds ratios > 1 raise scoring odds, < 1 lower them. Penalty N is small, so CIs are wide; read direction, not decimals.

survival.confound: Kick order is manager-chosen, so order effects and taker quality are entangled. Read these as description, not causation.

game.note: The game samples real StatsBomb placements and resolves each kick with a geometric reach model, not a coin flip. Save probability falls as the ball nears a top corner even when you guess the side.
